pi_items.source: Thunderbird source code (receipts.xhtml) shows value=0 maps to "Never send" while 2 maps to "Ask me". mailnews.display.prefer_plaintext=true and html_as=1 map to plain text display.

privileged_info_summary: The correct Return Receipt preference values for "Never send a return receipt" are 0, not 2 as claimed in the metadata (2 corresponds to "Ask me"). The values for disabling remote images (mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image=true), enabling scam detection (mail.phishing.detection.enabled=true), enabling Do Not Track (privacy.donottrackheader.enabled=true), and forcing plain text display (mailnews.display.prefer_plaintext=true and html_as=1) are correct.
